599709d36e47.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
599709d36e47.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
599709d36e47.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

2989bd2a5999.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
2989bd2a5999.description: Last inspected 2.0 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
2989bd2a5999.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
2989bd2a5999.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

ebd5001a72ac.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
ebd5001a72ac.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

fbff6dae101c.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
fbff6dae101c.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
fbff6dae101c.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

07f47330a84f.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
07f47330a84f.description: At 61 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
